summary: Completed comprehensive UI testing of Attention UI refinements for CapyMatch pipeline page (iteration 227). All 14 test cases passed. The UI copy/styling changes are correctly implemented including verb-first action headlines, visible reason stacks, calm subtext tone, carousel dots, position-aware summary card, breakdown pills, time-based actions, momentum signals, and passive low-tier styling.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from iteration 226
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attention UI refinement testing complete (iteration 227). All UI copy/styling changes verified: 1) Hero card shows 'Reply Now — Emory University' (coach flag priority over recap text), 2) Visible reason stack with 3 items: 'Overdue by 2 days', 'Flagged by coach', 'No activity in 8 days', 3) Calm subtext: 'Last contact 2 days ago · needs follow-up', 4) Carousel dots visible (2 dots), 5) Summary card header: 'You're in a good position — 2 schools need attention', 6) Breakdown pills: '2 need attention now' (red), '2 need a follow-up soon' (amber), '1 is on track' (green), 7) Insight: 'Emory University and Stanford University require action first.', 8) Florida shows 'Next best move' label (rank 0), UCLA does not (rank 1), 9) Time-based actions: 'Follow up in 7 days with University of Florida', 'Follow up in 5 days with UCLA', 10) Momentum text: 'Talking · Steady momentum', 11) Creighton in 'Just keep an eye' with 'No action needed · Added' and link-style 'View', 12) Section tier allocation: Hero:2, Keep things moving:2, Just keep an eye:1.

hero_card_tests.subtext: PASS - Shows 'Last contact 2 days ago · needs follow-up' (calm factual tone)
hero_card_tests.carousel_dots: PASS - 2 dots visible for 2 hero items

summary_card_tests.header: PASS - 'You're in a good position — 2 schools need attention'
summary_card_tests.breakdown_pills: PASS - 3 pills: '2 need attention now' (red), '2 need a follow-up soon' (amber), '1 is on track' (green)
summary_card_tests.insight: PASS - 'Emory University and Stanford University require action first.'

medium_tier_tests.next_best_move_label: PASS - Florida (rank 0) shows 'Next best move', UCLA (rank 1) does not
medium_tier_tests.time_based_actions: PASS - Florida: 'Follow up in 7 days', UCLA: 'Follow up in 5 days'

low_tier_tests.creighton_card: PASS - Shows 'No action needed · Added' with link-style 'View'
